HGSS.546.0000:
When I was a wee lad, I was a
hotshot Trainer!\f
Here’s some words of advice: catch
a lot of Pokémon!\f
But you can only take six with you.\f
If you catch more, they’ll be sent to
your PC.\f
They won’t run away from the PC, so
there is no need to be alarmed.\f
Remember what I’m about to tell you...
Treat them all with utmost kindness!
